manifest.author: John Burnett
manifest.name: Tab File Path
manifest.description: Shows file paths in tabs

manifest.author: situ2001
manifest.name: Tab Group Arrangement
manifest.description: Arrange the tab group in a more flexible way. For now, it supports arranging evenly and expanded like VSCode. User can make action and switch mode of arrangement by clicking the status bar or executing commands.

manifest.author: Henry Gustafson
manifest.name: Tab Limiter
manifest.description: Limits the number of tabs that can be opened.

manifest.author: Ivan Chen
manifest.name: LRU Tab Limiter
manifest.description: Keeps Markdown tabs under a limit by replacing the least recently used tab.

manifest.author: Jon-Vii
manifest.name: Tab Link
manifest.description: Cursor-style ghost text autocomplete for linking to notes.

manifest.author: Nito
manifest.name: Tab Multi Select
manifest.description: Select and control multiple tabs with browser-like inputs.

manifest.author: o02c
manifest.name: Tab Navigator
manifest.description: Simple Tab Switcher, search open tabs.

manifest.author: Jordan Duabe
manifest.name: Tab Numbers
manifest.description: Shows numbered badges (1-8) on tabs when holding Ctrl/Cmd for quick keyboard navigation.

manifest.author: GnoxNahte
manifest.name: Tab Panels
manifest.description: Create tab panels to organize content into sections.

manifest.author: Steven Jin
manifest.name: Tab Rotator
manifest.description: This plugin rotates opened files to the left or right with a specified interval

manifest.author: namikaze-40p
manifest.name: Tab Selector
manifest.description: Quickly switch tabs in various ways.

manifest.author: Joshua Rozner
manifest.name: Tab Shifter
manifest.description: Enables shifting tabs between different tab splits and some other basic IDE tab functionalities

manifest.author: Obsidian
manifest.name: Tab Swap
manifest.description: Swap the active tab left or right.

manifest.author: Vasiliy Ivanov
manifest.name: TabJump
manifest.description: Switch between last two active tabs with a single hotkey (Alt-Tab behavior)

manifest.author: Vesa Vänskä
manifest.name: Table Beautifier
manifest.description: Converts ASCII/Unicode box-drawing tables into Markdown tables.

manifest.author: Daniel Aguerrevere
manifest.name: Table Checkbox Renderer
manifest.description: Interactive checkboxes for Markdown tables. Toggle checkboxes in Reading Mode to instantly update the Markdown file. Supports multiple checkboxes per cell and any table layout.

manifest.author: Matteo Paolieri
manifest.name: Table Checkbox Row Color
manifest.description: Interactive Markdown table checkboxes with row highlighting and optional strikethrough support.

manifest.author: 0x-DLN
manifest.name: Markdown table checkboxes
manifest.description: Converts markdown checkboxes in tables to HTML, and reflects the state upon (un)checking them.

manifest.author: lolieatapple
manifest.name: Table Column Resize
manifest.description: Drag table column borders to manually resize column widths. Widths persist across sessions.

manifest.author: Data Goose
manifest.name: Table Dashboard
manifest.description: Create dynamic dashboard visualizations from your markdown tables.

manifest.author: Tony Grosinger
manifest.name: Advanced Tables
manifest.description: Improved table navigation, formatting, manipulation, and formulas.

manifest.author: AidenLx
manifest.name: Table Extended
manifest.description: Enable extended table support with MultiMarkdown 6 syntax

manifest.author: fangface
manifest.name: Table Formatter
manifest.description: Formats Markdown tables when files are saved.

manifest.author: marcelflymark
manifest.name: Table Line Break Mobile
manifest.description: Insert line breaks into tables on mobile devices via shortcut or toolbar.

manifest.author: Akaswan
manifest.name: Table List
manifest.description: Adds a table view to manage your tasks.

manifest.author: moranrs
manifest.name: Table Master
manifest.description: All-in-one Markdown table workflow: floating toolbar, visual grid editor, and merged-cell support with MultiMarkdown ^^ / || syntax.

manifest.author: Brian Collery
manifest.name: TOC compatible with Publish
manifest.description: Create table of contents with user defined adjustments. All adjustments will be compatible with Obsidian Publish.

manifest.author: Ryan Hammond
manifest.name: Tabletop Music Player
manifest.description: Plays ambient TTRPG music tracks in the background using note front matter.

manifest.author: laofahai
manifest.name: Tablite
manifest.description: A fast CSV/TSV editor with virtual scrolling, inline editing, column filtering, and auto encoding detection.

manifest.author: phibr0
manifest.name: Tabout
manifest.description: Easily "tab out" of Links or other Markdown Formatting Characters.

manifest.author: Pawel Blazejewski
manifest.name: Tabula
manifest.description: Transform Markdown files using spreadsheet-inspired formulas and cell references. Write scripts to perform calculations, transform data, and automate table processing — all inside your vault.

manifest.author: majiajun
manifest.name: Tag Aliases
manifest.description: Define tag aliases that normalize tag input by suggesting and inserting primary tags for known aliases.

manifest.author: Alicia Wilkerson
manifest.name: Tag and Tally
manifest.description: Run Tag and Tally tabletop RPG sessions in your vault — dice resolution, an in-vault rulebook, NPC generator, random tables, and decks.

manifest.author: Hananoshika Yomaru
manifest.name: Tag Breakdown Generator
manifest.description: Breakdown nested tags into multiple parent tags

manifest.author: David Fasullo
manifest.name: Tag Buddy
manifest.description: Unlock powerful tag editing features in Reading Mode. Add, remove, and edit tags across your vault, in the active note or a single instance. Use tag summaries to roundup and process tagged content like an inbox.

manifest.author: agrison
manifest.name: Tag Classes
manifest.description: Automatically adds note tags as CSS classes on the view container for tag-based styling.

manifest.author: Jorrit van der Heide
manifest.name: Tag Explorer
manifest.description: Navigate your vault through a tag-generated folder tree.

manifest.author: Etai Solomon
manifest.name: Tag Fuzzy Find
manifest.description: Fuzzy-find a tag, then a note tagged with it. Quick Switcher-style, keyboard-only.

manifest.author: Stargazer-cc
manifest.name: Tag Group Manager
manifest.description: Manage tag groups and quickly insert tags.

manifest.author: wenlzhang
manifest.name: Tag Index
manifest.description: Create a curated list of important tags to serve as meaningful entry points to your knowledge base.

manifest.author: laximgqozaZZZYT
manifest.name: Tag Lens
manifest.description: Lightweight tag-membership visualisations: Icon Gallery, intersection lattice, co-occurrence heatmap, UpSet, BubbleSets.

manifest.author: Zacchary Dempsey-Plante
manifest.name: Tag Links
manifest.description: Allows tags to be opened as links using a hotkey.

manifest.author: Joshua Martius
manifest.name: TagMany
manifest.description: Add the same tag(s) to multiple notes in a folder (optionally including subfolders) at once.

manifest.author: Woukie
manifest.name: Tag My Notes (AI)
manifest.description: Tag notes with your chosen AI model, control which notes and tags to use, and modify the model's thought process to your liking.

manifest.author: Matthew Sumpter
manifest.name: Tag Page
manifest.description: Dynamically generate and update tag-specific pages, offering a consolidated view of each tag's references across your vault.
